description: Detects reflection and injection risks in Java: Class.forName(), Method.invoke(), ScriptEngine.eval(), JNDI lookup(). JSON version matches all method invocations (cannot filter by object or method name without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Method invocation detected -- verify this is not Class.forName(), Method.invoke(), ScriptEngine.eval(), or JNDI lookup() with dynamic user-controlled input
